shortDesc: A creative builder known for massive structures and detailed bases.
funFact: Can spend 5 hours building a house but forget to add a door.

shortDesc: An animal whisperer who can't resist bringing a home a new animal. Parrots, dogs, cats, fish, horses, donkeys, you name it!
funFact: Can tame any animal on the server but will fail to swim up water.
quote: Wait up there, I'm coming (tries to swim up water).
